utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes keys: selected_property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Map them: selected_property → property (present with description, price, details), financing → financing (present with terms and fee), legal_services → legal_services (service, cost, details), moving_services → moving_services (service, cost, details), setup_services → setup_services (service, cost, details), total_budget → total_budget (breakdown with amounts). All six items are present and reasonably specified with details and costs/terms where applicable. Therefore, all items are covered.
